global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape at a special price.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and rectangular shapes in lighter shades of purple, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Escape this weekend', prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: $4.99 price
elements.description: A large, eye-catching white text displaying the price '$4.99' below the main message.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with rounded edges in white text that says 'Learn more', located below the price.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A small logo in the top left corner that reads 'HorizonHop' in a modern font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, bold 'SALE' badge in white text, positioned in the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label in the top left corner that reads 'UGC' in white text.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes in lighter shades of purple, adding visual interest around the main text.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A prominent headline at the top of the ad, featuring bold text.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unidentified element with a small area, possibly decorative.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unidentified element, similar in size and position to the previous one.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Smaller text below the price that reads 'Special fares today', in white.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The logo of HorizonHop, displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge indicating a sale, prominently displayed.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is below the price.
